name: Tts
description: A plugin for generating text-to-speech using FAL.ai API within the ElizaOS ecosystem, featuring automatic language detection and voice selection.

TTS_AUTO_MODE.label: Auto Mode
TTS_AUTO_MODE.help: When to automatically apply TTS (off, always, inbound, tagged)

TTS_SUMMARIZE.label: Summarize
TTS_SUMMARIZE.help: Summarize long text instead of truncating

TTS_MAX_LENGTH.label: Max Length
TTS_MAX_LENGTH.help: Maximum text length for TTS synthesis

TTS_DEFAULT_PROVIDER.label: Default Provider
TTS_DEFAULT_PROVIDER.help: Default TTS provider (auto, elevenlabs, openai, edge)
